body: The wireframes look great! I think we should consider adding a hero animation for the landing section.
Agreed on the animation. From a frontend perspective, we can use Framer Motion for that. I'll prototype it.
Love it! Let's aim to have the prototype ready by next Wednesday.
Great thinking, Priya. Let's map out which tokens we need first and identify any gaps.
I'll create a spreadsheet mapping design system tokens to website components. Should have it ready by tomorrow.
How many endpoints are affected? We should create a migration guide for external API consumers.
I count 12 endpoints with breaking changes. The auth flow is the biggest one. I can start on the migration guide.
Perfect. Alex, please also add deprecation warnings to the v1 endpoints so consumers have a heads-up period.
Will do. I'll add sunset headers with a 90-day deprecation window.
Impressive numbers! Can you also benchmark the search endpoint? That's been our bottleneck.
The 40% improvement is huge. Does this account for the new caching layer?
Yes, caching is included. I'll add search benchmarks to the report by Friday.
